overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking along a forest trail at dusk during overcast weather. The character carries a lit torch that illuminates the dirt path surrounded by dense woodland, tall grass, and stormy skies.

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks steadily along the dirt path holding a torch in his left hand, with swords strapped to his back

entered.detail: winding dirt trail through the woodland
dense deciduous trees forming the left forest edge
dense deciduous trees forming the right forest edge
tall grass and bushes lining the left side of the path
tall grass and vegetation on the right side of the trail
dark overcast storm clouds visible through the tree canopy

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Geralt walking along a winding dirt trail through a forest at dusk. The path is flanked by tall grass and dense trees on both sides, with dark storm clouds visible overhead. The torch casts a warm orange glow on the path ahead as the character moves steadily forward through the natural woodland environment.

events.description: character approaches and passes large rocks scattered on the path

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues walking along the trail, navigating past rocks on the path while the torch illuminates the way

entered.detail: large boulders and rocks scattered across the dirt trail

segments.scene_description: Continuing through the forest, the trail features scattered rocks that the character passes by. The forest canopy draws closer on both sides as the path winds deeper into the woods. The stormy sky remains visible overhead, and the torchlight creates dramatic shadows on the uneven ground.

events.description: cluster of white wildflowers becomes visible on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: Geralt maintains a steady pace along the trail, passing white flowers on the left as the forest grows denser

entered.detail: cluster of small white flowers blooming beside the trail

segments.scene_description: In the final segment, the path continues through increasingly dense forest with white wildflowers visible on the left verge. The rocks from the previous section fall behind as the trail extends forward into the darkening woodland. The character's torch remains the primary light source against the dark stormy backdrop.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a winding forest trail that grows increasingly dense and dark under a stormy dusk sky. It begins with Geralt walking along a dirt path flanked by tall grass, where a lit torch casts a warm orange glow against the looming dark clouds. As the character moves forward, the trail winds deeper into the woods and passes scattered rocks, causing the forest canopy to close in and create dramatic shadows on the uneven ground. The scene then shifts toward an even thicker stretch of woodland where white wildflowers appear along the left verge. Finally, the rocks fall behind as the path extends further into the darkening forest, leaving the torch as the primary light source against the oppressive backdrop.
